metadata.description: Content repurposing tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-repurpose
plugins.description: Content Repurposing Engine for Claude Code. 20 sub-skills covering Twitter/X, Threads, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Snapchat, Facebook, YouTube Community, Skool, Discord, Reddit, Quora, Medium, WhatsApp Channels, Telegram, Newsletter/Email, quote graphics, SEO metadata, and publishing calendars. Transforms any content into 17+ platform-optimized outputs with brand voice adaptation, poll generation, and AI image generation via /banana.
